title: Analyst Praises Molson Coors Beverage Stock's Setup
text: Molson Coors Beverage Co (NYSE:TAP) stock is unchanged in premarket trading, even after Moody's Investors Services upgraded its senior unsecured rating to Baa2 from Baa3 and revised its outlook to positive.

title: Moody's upgrades Molson Coors by one notch and says it has enough cash to reduce debt while rewarding shareholders
text: Moody's Investors Service upgraded Molson Coors Beverage Co.'s TAP, +2.10% senior unsecured rating to Baa2 from Baa3 on Wednesday, and revised the outlook to positive. The move reflects “consistent debt repayment, conservative leverage targets and recent good revenue and EBITDA growth that is leading to solid debt to EBITDA leverage improvement to 2.6x as of the 12 months ended September 2023 (Moody's adjusted basis) as well as consistently strong free cash flow,” the agency said in a statement.

title: Molson Coors (TAP) Q3 Earnings & Sales Beat on Brand Strength
text: Molson Coors' (TAP) Q3 results reflect gains from strength in its core brands and business units, solid pricing, and a favorable sales mix, offset by consumer inflationary pressures.

title: Molson Coors raises full-year core profit forecast after 3Q earnings top estimates
text: Molson Coors Brewing Company (NYSE:TAP) upped its full-year core profit forecast after its third quarter financial results top estimates driven by increased prices and steady demand for its beer brands. For 3Q, the Coors Lite, Miller Lite, and Molson Canadian-maker's revenue increased 12.4% year-over-year from $2.94 billion to $3.3 billion, ahead of estimates of $3.24 billion.

title: Molson Coors' stock pops premarket after earnings crush estimates and company raises profit guidance
text: Molson Coors Beverage Co.' stock TAP, +0.74% rose 1.4% premarket Thursday, after the brewer beat estimates for the third quarter by a wide margin and raised profit guidance. The company posted net income of $430.7 million, or $1.98 a share, in the third quarter, almost double the $216.4 million, or 99 cents a share, posted in the year-earlier period.
